payload.title: Phase 1 login: GitHub OAuth + API token (single-tenant)
payload.description: Replace the LAN loopback-bypass + single shared token (src/auth.js) with GitHub OAuth issuing an HttpOnly session cookie for the web UI, plus a long-lived API token for CLI/iOS. Single-tenant scope (one org); design the middleware so the full SCP-122 multi-tenant model slots in later. Add a CORS allowlist. Depends on o1. (From SCP-126; phase-1 subset of the auth work.)
